item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 35min Mayo will find it a lot more difficult to pursue their favourite pastime (trying for point
item.description: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 35min Mayo will find it a lot more difficult to pursue their favourite pastime (trying for pointers - according to Soupy!) against a more restrictive Roscommon in their upcoming Connacht semi-final 0:32 471

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 36min Kilkenny's Paddy Deegan is hoping to use the crushing defeat to Galway in the league as extra mo
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 36min Kilkenny's Paddy Deegan is hoping to use the crushing defeat to Galway in the league as extra motivation for Sunday’s @gaaleinster Hurling Championship opener with the Tribesmen #rtegaa #sundaygame De rte.ie 791

item.title:
SportTG4: Spórt TG4 @SportTG4 · 55min Bí linn an Satharn seo do Clár Faisnéise nua Lú Abú The Louth LGFA Story!
Tune in for behin
